trump_signals.headline: Trump 100% pharma tariff; risk of 200% by late 2026
IEEPA ruled unlawful; 10% universal tariff via Section 232/122/301
Trump naval blockade of Strait of Hormuz; WTI $96-104
Trump 威脅若中國向伊朗輸送武器加徵 50% 關稅

market.notes: 【21:00 更新】JPM Q1 大幅超預期（EPS +9%）確認銀行財報季開門紅，Financial sentiment 升至 bullish；Intel/Oracle 科技股大漲帶動 Technology sentiment 升至 bullish。但 Fear&Greed 跌至 15（Extreme Fear），市場情緒與股價走勢背離——S&P 連4漲但投資人仍極端恐懼，為典型 'climbing wall of worry' 情境。Iran 停火信號帶動盤中反彈，但解除二元風險尚早。每日最高監控優先：①Iran 24h 動態 ②FOMC 4/28-29。

breadth.guidance: Mixed signals. Be selective with new positions and tighten risk controls.
actions: Focus on stocks with strong relative strength
Avoid lagging sectors and speculative names

bearish_signal.signal: WARNING (muted): Bearish signal active in downtrend, but 8MA=0.544 still relatively strong [PINK ZONE]
bearish_signal.label: Bearish Signal Status

200MA Level.significance: Key support/resistance for 8MA. 8MA crossing below is an early warning of deterioration, not a standalone bearish signal.

Extreme Weakness (0.40).significance: 8MA below 0.40 marks extreme weakness. Historically, troughs at this level precede significant rallies.

Healthy Threshold (0.60).significance: 8MA above 0.60 indicates broad participation. Below 0.60 = selective market, above = inclusive rally.

Historical Avg Peak.significance: Average peak level. Approaching this level suggests breadth may be near a cyclical high.

Historical Avg Trough.significance: Average extreme trough level. Reaching this level is a potential contrarian buy signal.

market_top.guidance: Early warning signs detected. Tighten stops and reduce new entries.
market_top.ftd_reason: Composite < 40 (Green/Yellow zone) - FTD monitoring not needed

watch_conditions.exit_stop: 跌破 $305 (MA cluster 下緣) = Stage 2 失效
watch_conditions.momentum_break: RSI 回不到 55 以下代表動能破壞 → 重新評估
watch_conditions.customer_risk: Google/OpenAI custom silicon 合作反轉 → 取消

watch_conditions.conservative_entry: $398-415 MA20/50 cluster 回測不破 + 日陽包陰 + 量 > 1.2×
watch_conditions.exit_stop: 跌破 $395 (MA50 下緣 ATR 緩衝) 立即停損
watch_conditions.tsm_earnings_risk: TSM 04-16 miss 或 guidance 下修 → 取消 aggressive 第二批
watch_conditions.hbm_supply_shock: Samsung/SK Hynix HBM4 提前量產或降價 → 縮倉

watch_conditions.entry_C: F&G<25 + RSI<30 = 極端悲觀底部逆向機會

watch_conditions.entry_A: 回調$253-258，RSI降至35附近，200MA支撐確認
watch_conditions.entry_C: WWDC 2026 Siri 2.0正式亮相確認AI super-cycle

news.headline: Iran-US ceasefire fragile; Hormuz blockade partially active as Vance prepares 2nd round talks
news.bull_case: Talks resuming in 2 days per Trump, market pricing in de-escalation (oil already +3% but off highs)
news.bear_case: Ceasefire violated both sides, Lebanon conflict separate, Hormuz blockade unresolved, oil volatility structural until June 2027 capacity concern
news.arbiter_reasoning: Neither side committed, but negotiation channel open. Binary event pending. Market best positioned with DEFENSE overweight + ENERGY neutral.
news.debate_note: 2-week ceasefire began 4/8 → expires ~4/22. Decision window is THIS week.

news.headline: TSMC Q1 2026 earnings Thursday 4/16: expects $35.47B revenue, $3.26 EPS, 59% gross margin
news.headline_zh: 台積電 Q1 2026 財報 4/16 公布，預估營收 $35.47B、EPS $3.26、毛利率 59%
news.bull_case: AI chip demand holds through Middle East conflict; premium 3nm pricing pushes GM > 59%; long-term GM target likely raised above 58%; Qualcomm/MediaTek capacity filled with AI
news.bear_case: Margin peak warning from Wall Street; smartphone/PC outlook uncertain; Middle East supply chain disruption risk (shipping)
news.arbiter_reasoning: 4/16 is 1-day binary with high historical beat rate. Positive classification. TSM BUY thesis validated by guide-raise expectation.
news.debate_note: NVDA, AMD, AVGO all downstream of TSMC — any beat also lifts semi sector broadly

news.headline: NVIDIA Blackwell ramp delivers $0.5T visibility through 2026; hyperscalers deploying 1,000 NVL72 racks/week
news.headline_zh: NVDA Blackwell 量產至 2026 年底可視能見度 $0.5T，雲端巨頭每週部署 1,000 個 NVL72 機櫃
news.bull_case: 72,000 Blackwell GPUs/week hyperscaler deployment, $500B backlog through Dec 2026, Rubin next-gen locked
news.bear_case: China AI chip export deal (15% rev to US gov) caps upside; 25% Section 232 semi tariff effective Jan 2026
news.arbiter_reasoning: NVDA bull case fundamentally intact. Blackwell demand not the question — supply chain execution is the only risk.
news.debate_note: NVDA Q1 FY27 earnings ~late May; visibility extended to end 2026 significantly reduces quarter-by-quarter risk

news.headline: FOMC 4/28-29 meeting: markets price 85% hold at 3.50-3.75%, no dot plot this meeting
news.headline_zh: FOMC 4/28-29 會議：市場定價 85% 維持 3.50-3.75%，本次無 dot plot
news.bull_case: Hold provides rate certainty; if Powell hints June cut → risk-on rally
news.bear_case: Inflation still above 2% target, 'progress stalled' language, Iran conflict + oil could delay cuts further to July+
news.arbiter_reasoning: Language is the event, not the decision. Watch for 'patience' vs 'data-dependent' phrasing. Positioning BEFORE 4/29 risky due to reaction asymmetry.
news.debate_note: Non-SEP meeting historically causes lower vol reaction than SEP meetings; June 16-17 is next SEP where actual cut telegraphed

news.headline: Q1 2026 earnings season kicks off with 12.6% expected profit growth — 6th consecutive double-digit quarter
news.headline_zh: Q1 2026 財報季開跑，預估獲利成長 12.6%，連 6 季雙位數成長
news.bull_case: 6 consecutive strong quarters, bull momentum resilient to geopolitical noise
news.bear_case: Goldman's stock drop on FICC miss shows how high the bar is; any disappointment punished
news.arbiter_reasoning: Earnings season is an alpha generator but amplifies dispersion. Pre-earnings positioning risky, post-earnings reaction is the edge.
news.debate_note: Banks start Monday; TSM Thursday; NFLX / Tesla / AMD next week; NVDA late May

news.headline: US-China semiconductor tariff peace extended to Nov 10, 2026; next hike deferred to June 2027
news.headline_zh: 美中半導體關稅停戰延長至 2026 年 11 月 10 日，下次調升延至 2027 年 6 月
news.bull_case: 18 months of tariff stability for semi supply chain; NVDA/AMD keep 15% revenue deal stable
news.bear_case: Section 232 25% still active for specified chip imports since Jan 2026; 15% NVDA/AMD 'revenue tax' ongoing
news.arbiter_reasoning: Near-term tail risk removed; structural 15% rev tax + 25% Section 232 remain as persistent drag.
news.debate_note: Removes June 2026 tariff cliff from binary risks list — positive for 2026 semi earnings

news.headline: Goldman Sachs Q1 beats EPS but FICC misses; stock -3% pre-market
news.headline_zh: 高盛 Q1 EPS 超預期但 FICC 收入不如預期，盤前跌 3%
news.bull_case: M&A and equity trading strong, underlying franchise intact
news.bear_case: FICC weakness = fixed income trading slump = concerning for JPM/MS peer reads; sets cautious tone for bank season
news.arbiter_reasoning: Single-company issue but sector tone-setter. Watch JPM / MS for read-through.
news.debate_note: Banking sector already WARM in sector scan; this reinforces COLD thesis on investment banks

news.headline: Dollar Index (DXY) approaches 99 on oil rise + Fed hold expectations
news.headline_zh: 美元指數逼近 99，油價上升 + Fed 維持利率預期推動
news.bull_case: Strong dollar is anti-inflationary at margin
news.bear_case: FX translation drag for mega caps; EM currency pressure; commodity deflation
news.arbiter_reasoning: Secondary effect, not a direct driver. Watch if DXY breaks 100 (psychological).
news.debate_note: DXY < 99 = mild headwind, > 100 would be material

news.headline: S&P 500 approaches all-time high 7,002 as Nasdaq +1.96%, Dow +0.66%
news.headline_zh: S&P 500 逼近歷史新高 7,002，Nasdaq +1.96% 科技領漲
news.bull_case: S&P 500 within 0.3% of all-time high 7002.28; Nasdaq +2% shows AI trade intact; bank earnings season kicks off
news.bear_case: Near-ATH entries = poor RR; any shock = big downside; breadth 36.8 still weakening warns of narrow leadership
news.arbiter_reasoning: Momentum real but RR degraded near ATH. Chase trades dangerous. Focus on individual oversold names (PLTR type).

news.headline: ASML Q1 earnings beat on intense AI demand — strong read-through for TSMC tomorrow
news.headline_zh: ASML Q1 財報超預期，AI 需求強勁 — 利多 TSM 明日財報
news.bull_case: ASML 's strong Q1 validates AI capex super-cycle; N2 ramp at TSMC supported; bullish TSM 4/16 print
news.bear_case: None material — ASML is the cleanest tell on semi equipment demand
news.arbiter_reasoning: This is a POSITIVE leading indicator for TSM tomorrow. Reinforces TSM BUY thesis from V4.6 analysis.
news.debate_note: Read-through strength: ASML > TSMC > NVDA/AMD/AVGO in the AI capex chain

news.headline: Trump: Iran war 'close to over', 2nd round of talks in Pakistan within days; ceasefire expires 4/21
news.headline_zh: 川普：伊朗戰爭「接近結束」，巴基斯坦第二輪談判即將舉行，停火期 4/21 到期
news.bull_case: Trump 'close to over' comment + Iran offering safe passage = bull de-escalation path; oil should retreat on confirmation
news.bear_case: Nuclear sticking point (US wants 20yr halt, Iran wants 3-5yr); US military still blockading; ceasefire expires in 6 days
news.arbiter_reasoning: Shift from 4/14 binary concern → 4/15 mild positive bias. Still binary but weighted toward de-escalation.
news.debate_note: Ceasefire 4/21 expiration window is THE event; binary decision next week

news.headline: Treasury Sec Bessent: Fed can wait on cuts until Iran oil impact clearer
news.headline_zh: 財長 Bessent：Fed 可等待 Iran 油價衝擊明朗後再降息
news.bull_case: Bessent still expects inflation to moderate; rate cuts delayed, not cancelled
news.bear_case: Treasury-Fed coordination signals patience; 2026 only 1 cut expected; Iran + oil keeps core PCE elevated 2.7%
news.arbiter_reasoning: Reduces probability of June cut. Yield curve to stay high. Long-duration assets (REITs/growth) mild headwind.
news.debate_note: Fed March 2026: 1 cut for year maintained; core PCE revised up to 2.7% (was 2.5%)

news.headline: Goldman Sachs Q1 2026：EPS $17.55 創紀錄，Equities +27% YoY；股價盤前 -4%
news.headline_zh: Goldman Sachs Q1 2026：EPS $17.55 創紀錄，Equities +27% YoY；股價盤前 -4%
news.bull_case: Equities trading 創紀錄 $5.33B +27%；金融板塊基本面確認
news.bear_case: 利多出盡賣壓；Fixed Income -10% YoY；機構分發跡象
news.arbiter_reasoning: Bull 數字採納，Bear 市場反應採納；利多出盡結構性信號不可忽視
news.debate_note: 數字好但股價跌 = 市場對金融板塊態度謹慎，非基本面問題

news.headline: JPMorgan Q1 2026 今日盤前發布：預期 EPS $5.45，Revenue -8% YoY
news.headline_zh: JPMorgan Q1 2026 今日盤前發布：預期 EPS $5.45，Revenue -8% YoY
news.bull_case: 低基期（Revenue -8% YoY）有助驚喜效果；GS 強勁 equities revenue 為正面先行指標
news.bear_case: 若 Dimon 展望悲觀 + 提高信貸損失準備，Financial 立即承壓
news.arbiter_reasoning: 結果未知，強制 binary_risk within_48h；GS 數據提供方向但不保證
news.debate_note: GS strong equities revenue 為正面先行指標但不保證 JPM 複製

news.headline: Trump 威脅若中國向伊朗輸送武器將加徵 50% 關稅
news.headline_zh: Trump 威脅若中國向伊朗輸送武器將加徵 50% 關稅
news.bull_case: 「if we catch them」條件式；5 月峰會談判槓桿；中方明確否認，概率不高
news.bear_case: 雙前線地緣風險（Iran + China）；稀土反制潛力極大；科技供應鏈結構性衝擊
news.arbiter_reasoning: Bear 主論點採納；條件式打折但不能忽視；新增結構性尾部風險
news.debate_note: 條件式威脅 vs 中美峰會前發言 = 談判籌碼 or 真實威脅解讀分歧

news.headline: 美國海軍封鎖伊朗港口正式生效；法英啟動外交；川普稱伊朗「仍想談」
news.headline_zh: 美國海軍封鎖伊朗港口正式生效；法英啟動外交；川普稱伊朗「仍想談」
news.bull_case: WTI $103→$96 = 市場定價部分解決；停火可能 48h 內恢復
news.bear_case: 封鎖實際執行中；伊朗指控美違反停火；每日 CPI 能源壓力疊加
news.arbiter_reasoning: 每日新二元；停火恢復 = 市場大翻轉；封鎖持續 = 能源壓力
news.debate_note: 川普「仍想談」vs 伊朗外交部指控美違反停火 = 訊號混亂，每 24h 更新

news.headline: Powell：升息不必要；但部分官員將升息重新放回桌上；全年仍預期一次降息
news.headline_zh: Powell：升息不必要；但部分官員將升息重新放回桌上；全年仍預期一次降損
news.bull_case: 主席明確「rates in good place」；全年仍預期一次降息；通膨預期 2.7% 年底
news.bear_case: FOMC 共識脆弱；4 月 CPI 若 ≥ 3.3% 降息論崩潰；匿名官員升息信號
news.arbiter_reasoning: Powell 鴿派為基準，但結構性升息風險在積累；FOMC 4/28-29 為最終仲裁節點
news.debate_note: 主席立場 vs 匿名官員升息信號 = FOMC 內部分歧擴大的信號

news.headline: JPMorgan Q1 實際：EPS $5.94 (+9% vs $5.45 est)；Net income $16.5B +13% YoY；Revenue $49.8B 超預期
news.headline_zh: JPMorgan Q1 實際：EPS $5.94 (+9% vs $5.45 est)；Net income $16.5B +13% YoY；Revenue $49.8B 超預期
news.bull_case: CIB $9B/21% ROE；NII +9%；資本回購 $8.3B；全業務超預期；Q1 銀行季度正式開門紅
news.bear_case: WFC 已出現 Revenue miss；JPM 為最強，他行未必複製；Dimon 措辭仍謹慎
news.arbiter_reasoning: 解除 09:15 BINARY；Financial 開門紅確認；JPM 為全行業領先指標，看多基本成立
news.debate_note: JPM 最強 vs WFC revenue miss = 銀行板塊分化開始，非全面性多頭

news.headline: 川普暗示願意與伊朗恢復談判；S&P +1.02%，Nasdaq +1.23%；WTI -2.8% 至 $96.31
news.headline_zh: 川普暗示願意與伊朗恢復談判；S&P +1.02%，Nasdaq +1.23%；WTI -2.8% 至 $96.31
news.bull_case: WTI 回落 = CPI 壓力緩解；S&P 連 4 漲 = FTD 動能確認；停火可能加速
news.bear_case: 封鎖今日正式生效；IRGC 仍威脅；法英拒絕配合；每日二元風險未解
news.arbiter_reasoning: 每 24h 更新有效；停火暗示帶動盤中反彈但封鎖結構未變
news.debate_note: 川普推文 vs 封鎖實際執行 = 每日市場方向決定者，不能長期押注

news.headline: Intel 9日 +53% / +$100B 市值：Terafab AI 晶片 + Google 合作 + NVIDIA $5B 戰略投資 + 18A 製程
news.headline_zh: Intel 9日 +53% / +$100B 市值：Terafab AI 晶片 + Google 合作 + NVIDIA $5B 戰略投資 + 18A 製程
news.bull_case: 18A 製程量產 + NVIDIA $5B + $15B backlog = 結構性轉機；美國半導體製造復興敘事打開
news.bear_case: 63x 2027E EPS（NVDA 4 倍溢價）；Intel 執行力歷史問題；9 日 +53% = 動能過熱
news.arbiter_reasoning: BULLISH for Tech/Semiconductors；估值過熱警告附帶；AI 製造復興敘事確認
news.debate_note: 故事很好但估值 63x 2027E = 需要執行力完美兌現，高槓桿投機

news.headline: Oracle +13%：AI 公有雲公告帶動軟體板塊全面反彈
news.headline_zh: Oracle +13%：AI 公有雲公告帶動軟體板塊全面反彈
news.bull_case: AI = 軟體升級週期（非顛覆）；Morocco 雲端擴張；最佳單日漲幅；軟體板塊 re-rating
news.bear_case: 單日 13% 過度反應；AI 公告缺乏具體財務指引；AWS/Azure 競爭壓力持續
news.arbiter_reasoning: BULLISH，Software AI 升級敘事重估中；單日幅度大但方向確認
news.debate_note: AI 軟體升級 vs 競爭壓力 = 短期情緒驅動 vs 長期基本面需要驗證

news.headline: Wells Fargo Q1：EPS $1.60 微超；Revenue $21.45B miss $21.77B 估
news.headline_zh: Wells Fargo Q1：EPS $1.60 微超；Revenue $21.45B miss $21.77B 估
news.bull_case: EPS 微超；NII +5%；貸款 +10.7% YoY；存款 +5.7%；資產品質穩定
news.bear_case: Revenue 連 3 季 miss；Asset Cap 限制成長空間；Q2 準備金壓力潛在
news.arbiter_reasoning: NEUTRAL；JPM beat 仍主導 Financial 正面情緒；WFC 為邊際負面但非主導
news.debate_note: JPM 強 vs WFC 弱 = 銀行板塊分化，非系統性問題，選股而非選板塊

news.headline: Fear & Greed Index 跌至 15（Extreme Fear），從今晨 41 大幅惡化
news.headline_zh: Fear & Greed Index 跌至 15（Extreme Fear），從今晨 41 大幅惡化
news.bull_case: 極端恐懼 = 逆向買入信號；S&P 連 4 漲中仍極端恐懼 = Climbing Wall of Worry；FOMO 動能尚未啟動
news.bear_case: 伊朗戰爭情境下極端恐懼可持續 3+ 月；機構去風險行動未完成；零售投資人仍在離場
news.arbiter_reasoning: BEARISH（環境確認）；整體板塊情緒折扣；逆向信號值得記錄但不改變整體格局
news.debate_note: Extreme Fear + 股價漲 = Climbing Wall of Worry 還是 Dead Cat Bounce，需後續確認

news.headline: Iran Ceasefire Announced (Apr 8) but Hormuz Still Effectively Closed; Ships Paying $1M+ Tolls
news.headline_zh: 伊朗停火宣布（4/8），但霍爾木茲海峽仍實質封閉，船隻被收取百萬通行費
news.bull_case: 停火訊號降低風險溢價，油價從 $110+ 回落至 $94，談判機制已開啟
news.bear_case: 海峽仍封閉，ADNOC CEO 4/9 確認無進展，Goldman 警告油價全年均破 $100
news.arbiter_reasoning: 停火存在但未被執行，binary 解讀最準確；油價下行需看到海峽實際重開
news.debate_note: 「停火存在」vs「停火有效執行」是關鍵分歧

news.headline: March CPI +3.3% YoY / +0.9% MoM — Energy-Driven; Hottest Monthly Print in Months (Released Apr 10)
news.headline_zh: 3月 CPI 年增 3.3%、月增 0.9%，能源主導，近月最熱（4/10 公布）
news.bull_case: 能源貢獻 3/4 月增量，剔除能源後核心仍溫和，屬暫時性通膨
news.bear_case: +0.9% MoM 是近月最高，年增 3.3% 讓 Fed 降息空間幾乎歸零，升息討論浮現
news.arbiter_reasoning: Fed 看整體 CPI 非核心，能源驅動不等於可忽略；升息風險明顯上升，採 Bear 論點
news.debate_note: 「能源 = 暫時性」vs「整體 CPI 高企 = Fed 被迫行動」

news.headline: FOMC Minutes: Some Officials Discuss Possible Rate Hikes; Next Decision April 29
news.headline_zh: FOMC 議事錄：部分官員討論升息可能性，下次決策 4/29
news.bull_case: 多數官員維持「通膨符合預期則降息」基準，鷹派屬少數聲音
news.bear_case: 首次出現升息措辭，科技高估值（P/E 30x+）面臨重新定價，4/29 決策變 binary
news.arbiter_reasoning: 「升息討論」是 2023 年以來首次敘事轉折，不能低估；採 Bear 論點，4/29 列為 binary risk
news.debate_note: 升息討論是敘事轉折點還是例行鷹派少數聲音？

news.headline: Trump Section 232 Pharma Tariffs: 100% on Patented Imports, EU/JP/CH at 15% (120-180 Day Runway)
news.headline_zh: 川普製藥關稅：專利藥進口課 100%，歐日韓瑞 15%，生效緩衝 120-180 天
news.bull_case: 120-180 天緩衝期，部分藥廠加速美國在地化，長期利好本土製造
news.bear_case: 史上最高藥品關稅，推高醫療通膨，歐盟藥廠（羅氏、諾華）利潤率受壓
news.arbiter_reasoning: 短期衝擊 Healthcare 板塊，中期通膨推升壓力，Bear 採納
news.debate_note: 「本土製造受益」vs「進口成本大幅上升」

news.headline: US-China Semiconductor Tariffs Delayed to June 2027 Under Trump-Xi Stability Framework
news.headline_zh: 美中半導體關稅延至 2027 年 6 月，川習穩定框架有效
news.bull_case: 科技供應鏈在 2026 年底前不受新衝擊，NVDA / AMD / TSM / ANET AI 採購週期不受打斷
news.bear_case: 2027 起稅率未定，不確定性懸掛；若 5 月峰會破局可能提前啟動
news.arbiter_reasoning: 短期明確利多，供應鏈確定性恢復；但峰會是關鍵 binary event 需持續追蹤
news.debate_note: 「短期確定性受益」vs「中期不確定性仍在」

news.headline: Major Bank Q1 Earnings Kick-Off: GS (Apr 13), JPM/C/WFC (Apr 14), BAC (Apr 15) — IB Fees +18-30% Expected
news.headline_zh: 大型銀行 Q1 財報季開幕：GS（今天）、JPM/C/WFC（明天）、BAC（後天），IB 費用預期 +18-30%
news.bull_case: GS IB 費用預期 +30%、JPM +18%，M&A 復甦確認，Financials 估值修復
news.bear_case: 預期已高，任何 miss 或下調 guidance（loan loss provisions 受伊朗影響）均有大賣壓
news.arbiter_reasoning: 雙方論點旗鼓相當，市場方向完全取決於數字，今天 GS 結果是最佳先行指標
news.debate_note: 高預期 + 伊朗不確定性，miss 比 beat 的市場反應更不對稱
